Notice Of Defendant Calportland Companys Motion For A Change Of Venue Pursuant To Ccp Sections 396b(A), 397(A)
Off Calendar Feb-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Calportland Company's Motion for a Change Of Venue from San Francisco County, to Superior Court of California of Los Angeles County, Central District, Los Angeles Superior Court. Pursuant To CCP Sections 396b(A), 397(A). John D. Van Ackeren, of Berkes, Crane, Robinson & Seal LLP, (213) 955-1150, (Appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Defendant Cal Portland Company, and moving party; Jesse Boyd, Esq. of Stevens, Drummond & Clifford, (925) 944-5550, appearing for Defendant John K. Bice, counsel left card and signed in, but did not appear when case was called. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, pursuant to stipulation to transfer case. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
